test_sufficiency_summary: Sufficient for TBCP-002 scope: TacticalGuiLiveTest posts real ID_TacticalQuit and a separate wxEVT_CLOSE_WINDOW vector, WXGuiTestHarness bounds async close observation, FTacticalBattleScreenElectricalFireTest preserves shared close-path and quit-binding assertions, and reruns passed with OK (157 tests) and OK (40 tests).
documentation_accuracy_summary: Accurate: AGENTS.md and doc/DesignNotes.md now describe the real quit/title-bar close vectors, the waitForTopLevelWindowClosed(...) async close seam, and the relaxed sequencing guarantee in a way that matches the implementation and tests.
